title: Food & Restaurants
shortSummary: Navigate menus, order food and drinks, ask for the bill, and talk about your food preferences in Spanish. From tapas bars in Madrid to street food in Mexico City — eat your way through the Spanish-speaking world.
whyItMatters: Food is the fastest way into any culture. Ordering in a restaurant is one of the most common real-world situations where you will use Spanish, and it builds massive confidence. Plus, you get to eat great food.
coreConcepts: Restaurant vocabulary: menú, cuenta, propina, camarero
Ordering food: Quisiera / Me gustaría / Para mí...
Dietary requirements: vegetariano, sin gluten, alergia a
Describing food: delicioso, picante, dulce, salado, amargo
Drinks: agua, cerveza, vino, café, zumo
Asking for the bill: La cuenta, por favor
